VIDEO_CONVERTER.TITLE: Video Converter
VIDEO_CONVERTER.DESCRIPTION: Convert images and MP4 videos into AILY display frame files
VIDEO_CONVERTER.SELECT_OR_DROP: Select or drop a media file
VIDEO_CONVERTER.LITTLE_ENDIAN_HINT: All multi-byte integers use little-endian byte order
VIDEO_CONVERTER.LOOP_FLAG: Set the recommended loop flag (flags bit 0)
VIDEO_CONVERTER.OUTPUT_PREVIEW_EMPTY: The packed pixels will appear here after conversion
VIDEO_CONVERTER.PREVIEW_EXPLANATION: The preview is decoded from the exported data, so RGB565 byte order and XBM bit order can be checked directly.
VIDEO_CONVERTER.STATUS_SELECT_SOURCE: Select an image or MP4 video
VIDEO_CONVERTER.STATUS_COMPLETE_LIMIT: Conversion complete. The output budget reduced the frame limit to {count}.
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_FILE: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF and MP4 files are supported
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_WIDTH_RANGE: Width must be an integer from 1 to {max}
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_HEIGHT_RANGE: Height must be an integer from 1 to {max}
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_FRAME_LIMIT: Maximum frames must be an integer from 1 to {max}
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_MONO_THRESHOLD: MONO threshold must be an integer from 0 to 255
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_CANVAS_UNAVAILABLE: Unable to create an offscreen canvas
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_INVALID_REQUEST: Invalid conversion settings or source data
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_OUTPUT_BUDGET_EXCEEDED: The output exceeds the 256 MiB conversion budget
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_UNSUPPORTED_FILE_TYPE: The source file type is not supported
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_MP4_METADATA_FAILED: Unable to read the MP4 video track
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_MP4_NO_SAMPLES: The MP4 video track contains no decodable samples
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_MP4_PARSE_FAILED: Failed to parse the MP4 file
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_MP4_NO_VIDEO_TRACK: The MP4 file contains no video track
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_WEB_CODECS_UNSUPPORTED: This browser does not support WebCodecs VideoDecoder
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_CODEC_UNSUPPORTED: This browser does not support the MP4 video codec
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_MP4_NO_VALID_FRAMES: The MP4 file contains no convertible video frames
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_IMAGE_DECODER_UNSUPPORTED: This browser does not support WebCodecs ImageDecoder
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_IMAGE_TYPE_UNSUPPORTED: This browser cannot decode this image format
VIDEO_CONVERTER.ERROR_IMAGE_NO_VALID_FRAMES: The image contains no convertible frames
